arts.ttl: How to watch Fenerbahce vs Manchester United: TV channel and live stream for Europa League today
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag heads for Jose Mourinho showdown

arts.ttl: Manchester United summer signing can prove doubters wrong against player he replaced
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte is likely to return to the Man Utd team in Istanbul as Erik ten Hag's side face Fenerbahce in a key Europa League fixture.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho named and shamed four Man Utd stars - two have left the club
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho launched a scathing verbal attack on four Manchester United players a month before he was sacked in 2018 - and he has since been proven right in his assessment

arts.ttl: Fenerbahce vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: There's a feast of narratives on Thursday night as Fenerbahce take on Manchester United in the Europa League on Matchday 3 of the league phase. The winless United head into this fixture 21st in the league phase table, while the hosts are 13th with four points having beat Union Saint-Gilloise on Matchday 1.

arts.ttl: Two of the four Man Utd stars named and shamed by Jose Mourinho have left the club
arts.sum: Manchester United have made little progress since Jose Mourinho left the club under a dark cloud, with two of the players he publicly lambasted still playing for the Red Devils

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho shows Manchester United what they are missing during masterful press conference
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho was in his element as he reunited with English journalists in Istanbul, offering gifts, laughter and recommendations.

arts.ttl: Man United 'make Antony transfer decision' as club 'following' £75m-rated star
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news and gossip includes an update on Antony and Castello Lukeba

arts.ttl: Yoro, Shaw, Mainoo - Manchester United injury news and return dates ahead of Fenerbahce clash
arts.sum: Man United will be hoping to build on Saturday's 2-1 win over Brentford when they face Jose Mourinho's Fenerbahce in the Europa League on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank makes surprise admission over Man Utd job
arts.sum: Thomas Frank has admitted that taking the Manchester United job will "probably not make his life better" amid recent links. Along with Frank, former England manager Gareth Southgate as well as the club's assistant coach Ruud van Nistelrooy have both also been linked with taking charge at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: How Jose Mourinho has done at Fenerbahce so far ahead of Man Utd reunion
arts.sum: Last season's second place Super Lig finish qualified Fenerbahce for the 2024/25 Champions League, entering the competition in the second qualifying round in late July. Even more agonisingly, Fenerbahce, whose 93 points from 1988/89 was the previous single season Super Lig record, put up the second higher tally of all time (99) and still finished second.
